steps.sql:
SELECT a,
         SUM(1)                              AS t1,
         SUM(CASE WHEN b->>'x'=1 THEN 1 END) AS t2,
         SUM(c)                              AS t3,
         SUM(CASE WHEN b->>'x'=1 THEN c END) AS t4
    FROM t1
   WHERE d BETWEEN 0 and 10
   GROUP BY a;

EXPLAIN
  SELECT a,
         SUM(1)                              AS t1,
         SUM(CASE WHEN b->>'x'=1 THEN 1 END) AS t2,
         SUM(c)                              AS t3,
         SUM(CASE WHEN b->>'x'=1 THEN c END) AS t4
    FROM t1
   WHERE d BETWEEN 0 and 10
   GROUP BY a;

SELECT a,
         SUM(1)                              AS t1,
         SUM(CASE WHEN b->>'x'=1 THEN 1 END) AS t2,
         SUM(c)                              AS t3,
         SUM(CASE WHEN b->>'x'=1 THEN c END) AS t4
    FROM t1
   WHERE d BETWEEN 0 and 10
   GROUP BY +a;

DROP INDEX t1x;
  CREATE INDEX t1x ON t1(a, d, b->>'x', c);

SELECT a,
         SUM(1)                              AS t1,
         SUM(CASE WHEN b->>'x'=1 THEN 1 END) AS t2,
         SUM(c)                              AS t3,
         SUM(CASE WHEN b->>'x'=1 THEN c END) AS t4
    FROM t1
   WHERE d BETWEEN 0 and 10
   GROUP BY a;

EXPLAIN
  SELECT a,
         SUM(1)                              AS t1,
         SUM(CASE WHEN b->>'x'=1 THEN 1 END) AS t2,
         SUM(c)                              AS t3,
         SUM(CASE WHEN b->>'x'=1 THEN c END) AS t4
    FROM t1
   WHERE d BETWEEN 0 and 10
   GROUP BY a;

SELECT a,
         SUM(1)                              AS t1,
         SUM(CASE WHEN b->>'x'=1 THEN 1 END) AS t2,
         SUM(c)                              AS t3,
         SUM(CASE WHEN b->>'x'=1 THEN c END) AS t4
    FROM t1
   WHERE d BETWEEN 0 and 10
   GROUP BY a;
